# Antoine Boxho

> Antoine Boxho is a software engineer and the first hire (Member of Technical Staff) at Scope AI in London, automating one of the most overlooked industries in the world with language models.
> Ex-McKinsey (Core Tech & Analytics). Previously quant software engineer at FinMetrics. Co-founder of Takeo.io. Solvay Brussels School MEng (Cum Laude), with a year at the National University of Singapore.
> Based in London, UK. Contact: antoineboxho@gmail.com

## Context Pages

- [About Me](https://antoine.md/about.md): **Use this when:** you need to introduce me, write a bio, or understand my background.
- [Experience](https://antoine.md/experience.md): **Use this when:** you need a detailed professional history or to describe what I've worked on.
- [Education](https://antoine.md/education.md): **Use this when:** you need my academic background, degrees, or certifications.
- [Working with Me](https://antoine.md/working-with-me.md): **Use this when:** preparing to collaborate with me, drafting a message to me, or helping someone onboard onto my team.
- [Writing About Me](https://antoine.md/writing-about.md): **Use this when:** writing a speaker bio, press mention, or intro about me.
- [Contact](https://antoine.md/contact.md): **Use this when:** you need to reach me or find me online.

- [Complete context](https://antoine.md/llms-full.txt): All sections combined in one file.
